{{nihongo|'''Iida Inari Shrine'''|飯田稲荷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Inari shrine|lt=Inari shrine|en|Inari shrine|fa|معبد ایناری|fr|Sanctuaire Inari|ja|稲荷神社|ko|이나리 신사|simple|Inari shrine|uk|Святилище Інарі|qid=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11642130|ltq=Q11642130|qid=Q11642130|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 30
** P155: {{ill|Q135039604|ltq=Q135039604|qid=Q135039604|1=Asahihatakano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Irumino Shrine|lt=Irumino Shrine|qid=Q135039607|1=Irumino Shrine (Q135039607)}}
